evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; max age 100 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~* Men or women greater than or equal to 18 years old.~* ECOG ≤ 1~* Pathologically documented, previously treated, locally-advanced and unresectable or metastatic NSCLC with KRAS p.G12C mutation confirmed through central testing or have documentation of KRAS p.G12C mutation through Amgen Study 20190294 prior to enrollment~Exclusion Criteria:~* Active brain metastases~* Myocardial infarction within 6 months of study day 1~* Gastrointestinal (GI) tract disease causing the inabi...

title: RapidMeta Oncology | KRAS G12C Inhibitors in Pretreated KRAS-G12C-Mutated Advanced NSCLC NMA v1.0
